requirements: leads_to(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'check credit worthiness')
leads_to(tree, 'check credit worthiness', 'determine loan risk level')
executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'credit broker') or executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'supervisor')
leads_to(tree, 'check risk acceptability', 'approve request') or leads_to(tree, 'check risk acceptability', 'reject request')

data_leads_to_absence(tree, 'customerStatus == "gold" and loanRequestAmount < 1000000', 'determine loan risk level')
